CustomField.description: Org default (#verification). When FALSE (the default — and the value on existing/upgrading orgs that never set it), signers must verify a one-time email PIN before signing. Set TRUE to skip verification org-wide. Inverted "skip" semantics deliberately: a Checkbox can't represent "unset", so the safe default (verification required) must be the field's natural false state to survive upgrades. Templates and individual sends can still override.
CustomField.label: Skip Email Verification (Signatures)
